topic: Vitamin D's immune cell activation — beyond bone health
caption: Did you know Vitamin D does more than just bone health? 🌞 It activates immune cells to fight off infections! 💡 Learn how this vitamin supercharges your immunity. 🧬 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💕 #VitaminD #ImmuneSystem #BoneHealth #NutritionFacts #HealthBenefits #WellnessTips #ScienceBacked #MedicalBreakdowns
